summary: GitHubIssueClient no longer reuses a stale PyGithub client when running in GitHub App mode.
PAT mode still caches a single client instance to preserve existing behavior.
Added tests that lock the caching behavior for PAT auth and per-call rebuild behavior for GitHub App auth.
Removed the duplicate `/confirm` slash command while keeping internal `_generate_plan(..., alias_used=...)` compatibility for existing tests and internal callers.
Updated README command documentation and aligned `WORKFLOW.md` bind command text with the implemented `/issue` command.
Targeted verification passed with Ruff checks plus `tests/test_github_client.py` and `tests/test_discord_scheduler.py`.
risks: This change increases GitHub App client construction frequency; if needed, a later optimization can cache by token expiry instead of per call.
